project_milestones.Kronos: V20 Geometric Thermodynamics fully integrated into execution path. Optimized for adiabatic expansion detection.
project_milestones.Curiosity: Research on Complexity Gap (G) successfully transitioned from research to active gating logic.
project_milestones.PineStrategies: Materialized V20 series: TnSovereignThermodynamicBreakoutV20 and TnSovereignWaveTrendV20, bridging statistical physics with Pine v6.

high_signal_insights.insight: AI 代理正從『代碼編寫』下沉至『系統自癒』與『跨機協同』，主權邊界正向底層基礎設施擴張。
high_signal_insights.actionable: 評估將 LinHai 跨主機指令映射邏輯引入 TeleNexus 跨域規訓模組。

high_signal_insights.insight: 絕熱擴張（Adiabatic Expansion）是市場健康增長的幾何特徵，是主權資本進入的最佳物理窗口。
high_signal_insights.actionable: 強制要求 V20 策略在自由能 > 1.5 且分形熵 < 1.35 時方可執行。

audit_memo: 今日（5/10）系統正式進入『主權主宰 V20 擴展期』。我們成功將熱力學平衡算理實體化為具備執行力的金融策略（Breakout/WaveTrend），並同步吸納了開源社群關於『Agent 權限擴張』與『系統自癒』的前沿信號。主權防線現已具備熱力學與信息論的雙重鎮守能力。
